---
title: "Publications"
description: "Manuscripts and publications by Qingyang Liu."
---

This page lists verified bibliographic information only. Journal, DOI, and arXiv metadata will be added after they are publicly available and confirmed.

## Manuscripts

:::: {.publication-entry}
<p><span class="status-badge">Manuscript</span></p>

### Portraits of Charmoniumlike States

<p class="publication-authors">Qingyang Liu, Xiangyu Jiang, Ying Chen, Chunjiang Shi, and Wei Sun</p>

**Status:** Manuscript.

No journal acceptance, DOI, or arXiv link is listed at this stage.

<!-- TODO: Add only verified journal, DOI, arXiv, year, and public-link metadata when available. -->
::::

## Template for future entries

:::: {.publication-entry .publication-template}
<p><span class="status-badge status-badge--muted">Template</span></p>

### TODO — Paper title

**Authors:** TODO — verified author list  
**Venue or status:** TODO — journal, proceedings, preprint, or manuscript  
**Year:** TODO — verified publication year  
**Identifiers:** TODO — DOI and arXiv links, if assigned

Only fields supported by a public bibliographic record will be displayed.
::::
